Text_IdLoveToHearYourProfile.label: Text_IdLoveToHearYourProfile
Text_IdLoveToHearYourProfile.raw_text: Hi, glad to meet you!\p…That's unfriendly of you.\nHow about saying hi back?\pSo, come on, tell me about\nyourself.\pI'd love to hear your profile!$
Text_IdLoveToHearYourProfile.display_text:
Hi, glad to meet you!

…That's unfriendly of you.
How about saying hi back?

So, come on, tell me about
yourself.

I'd love to hear your profile!

Text_TellMeWhatsYourProfile.raw_text: Tell me something good about\nyourself. What's your profile?$

yourself. What's your profile?

Text_ExplainProfile.label: Text_ExplainProfile
Text_ExplainProfile.raw_text:
A profile is written using four
words or phrases.\pThere're plenty of words to choose
from for your profile.\pThe words and phrases are placed
in several convenient groups.\pFirst, choose a group, then choose
a word or phrase.\p…It's easier than it sounds.
Why don't you try it?$
Text_ExplainProfile.display_text:
A profile is written using four
words or phrases.

There're plenty of words to choose
from for your profile.

The words and phrases are placed
in several convenient groups.

First, choose a group, then choose
a word or phrase.

…It's easier than it sounds.
Why don't you try it?

Text_ProfileSaysSomethingAboutYou.raw_text: Hmhm…\pYour profile really says something\nabout who you are.\pNow that I know you better, it \nmakes us better friends than ever!$

Text_HeardThatBefore.label: Text_HeardThatBefore
Text_HeardThatBefore.raw_text: Oh, I've heard that before…\pMy cousin, who lives far away,\nalways used to say that, I think.$

Oh, I've heard that before…

My cousin, who lives far away,
always used to say that, I think.
